news.headline: JSSI makes key executive appointments in aviation capital division, shaping the future of JSSI Aviation Capital.
news.summary: In Chicago on February 18, 2025, JSSI, a prominent figure in the business aviation maintenance and financial services sectors, revealed key executive appointments in its aircraft financing branch. This move signifies a promising new phase for JSSI Aviation Capital (JAC). With a proven track record since its inception...

news.headline: Discover Dominica celebrates United Airlines' inaugural flight from Newark to Douglas-Charles Airport, making it the second U.S. carrier to offer nonstop service to Dominica.
news.summary: On February 15, 2025, United Airlines made history by becoming the second U.S. carrier to introduce nonstop flights from the United States to Dominica. This milestone was marked with a celebration by Discover Dominica Authority in Roseau, Dominica. The inaugural flight took off from Newark Liberty International Airport, further strengthening the air connectivity between the two countries. The introduction of this service signifies a significant step in promoting tourism and enhancing travel options for passengers.

news.headline: Creditors of FTX discuss plans and lessons learned as repayments commence after collapse, highlighting risks of centralized exchanges.
news.summary: The collapse of FTX has left numerous creditors in distress, highlighting the risks of holding cryptocurrency on centralized exchanges. This unfortunate event has resulted in significant mental anguish for many individuals affected. The incident serves as a stark reminder of the potential dangers associated with relying on centralized exchanges for storing digital assets, as the number of affected individuals continues to increase.

news.headline: Global FFPE tissue samples market to cross US$1.5B by 2034, growing at 5.1% CAGR from 2024. Rising cancer cases & genomic tech fuel demand. Opportunities in emerging markets and tech advancements in sample analysis. Aging population drives cancer burden, with 18.1M new cases in 2018 expected to rise to 29.5M by 2040.
news.summary: The global FFPE tissue samples for genomics study & analysis market was valued at US$891.1 million in 2023. It is projected to grow at a CAGR of 5.1% from 2024 to 2034, reaching over US$1.5 billion by the end of 2034. Key drivers for market growth include the rising incidence of cancer globally, advancements in genomic technologies, growing emphasis on personalized medicine, and increased funding for cancer research. Challenges like sample degradation, regulatory requirements, and high costs of genomic analysis could restrain growth. The global cancer burden, especially among the aging population, is a major factor driving demand for FFPE tissue samples. The International Agency for Research on Cancer reports that approximately 87% of cancer deaths occur among people aged 50 or older. The aging population and advancements in healthcare are expected to increase the number of individuals at risk of cancer, with 18.1 million new cancer cases worldwide in 2018 expected to rise to 29.5 million by 2040. Opportunities lie in emerging markets and innovative technology developments in sample preservation and analysis methods.

news.headline: Galen Healthcare Solutions, a part of RLDatix, named 2025 Best in KLAS for Data Archiving; top choice for hospitals.
news.summary: In a recent announcement on February 18, 2025, Galen Healthcare Solutions, a subsidiary of RLDatix, was acknowledged as a leading provider in aiding hospitals and health systems in acquiring and overseeing data. They were awarded the prestigious title of Best in KLAS in the Data Archiving category for the year 2025. This recognition highlights Galen Healthcare Solutions' commitment to excellence and their impact on the healthcare industry.

news.summary: Announced on February 18, 2025, in San Francisco, Valid, an AI-powered advertising agency revolutionizing digital marketing, disclosed a seed funding round worth $5.5 million. The funding was spearheaded by Canaan Partners and also included contributions from Neo, J Ventures, as well as notable strategic investors like Reddit CEO Steve Huffman and search advertising trailblazer Scott.

The guide aims to empower field teams in boosting franchisee success, optimizing local advertising impact, and expanding confidently. news.headline: RS introduces Phoenix Contact terminal blocks with Push-X technology for tool-free wiring, boosting efficiency.assertSameEffortless connections for all types of conductors.
news.summary: In Fort Worth, Texas, on February 18, 2025, Phoenix Contact introduced terminal blocks featuring Push-X technology. This innovation allows direct wiring connections for all types of conductors without requiring tools or force. Such efficiency improvements can enhance automated wiring processes, showcasing the benefits of this new technology.

First dual-branded Applebee's | IHOP opens in Seguin, Texas by Dine Brands; located in the United States.
news.summary: A restaurant conglomerate, Dine Brands, recently marked the inauguration of the inaugural dual-branded Applebee's | IHOP establishment in the United States. Situated in Seguin, Texas, this unique dining destination offers customers the chance to indulge in a diverse range of menu options from both renowned chains under one roof. This milestone represents a significant achievement for Dine Brands and the local community, showcasing the company's commitment to innovation and providing an enhanced dining experience. This dual-branded establishment aims to cater to a wide variety of tastes and preferences, combining the signature flavors and offerings of Applebee's and IHOP. This strategic move is expected to attract a broad customer base and boost revenue for the conglomerate.

news.headline: Global tungsten industry report covers 2019-2034 outlook. Includes data on manufacturing, consumption, trade, and price analysis. - ResearchAndMarkets
news.summary: A comprehensive report on the global tungsten market titled "Tungsten (Wolfram) World, Regions and Countries Market Review 2019-2024 and Forecast to 2034" is now available through ResearchAndMarkets.com. This report provides detailed insights into the world tungsten market, offering data on a global, regional, and national scale. It covers the period from 2019 to 2024 with analyses and forecasts extending to 2034. The report includes information on supply and demand trends, pricing dynamics, and downstream industries. It serves as a valuable resource for those seeking in-depth knowledge of the tungsten market landscape.

news.headline: Local mom opens Celebree School in Northbrook providing infant, toddler care, preschool, and more. (Characters: 93)

The franchise, Celebree School, is renowned for offering a comprehensive program that covers infant and toddler care, preschool, as well as before and aftercare services. news.headline: Grid Status launches power market data solution on Snowflake Marketplace for tracking grid conditions and pricing. Chicago, Feb. 18, 2025.

Users can utilize this data to monitor grid conditions, analyze pricing trends, forecast outcomes, and observe market participant behavior. RoadFlex partners with Casey's to offer fuel savings at 2800 locations, benefiting fleet cardholders.

Given fuel costs being a substantial part of fleet operational expenses, these savings hold significance. news.headline: SYNERGY® marks 30 years of Real Kombucha with new logo, limited-edition Wildflower Flavor to champion authentic fermentation.
news.summary: In an effort to safeguard the integrity of fermentation, a brand has launched a new wordmark and logo for "The Real Kombucha" alongside a special Wildflower flavor. The initiative, starting in Los Angeles on February 18, 2025, is inspired by the actions of GT Dave in 1995 at the age of 15, who ignited a fervor for authentic fermentation practices. The brand's commitment is reflected in the new symbol and product, symbolizing a dedication to preserving the ethos of fermentation.

news.headline: Subsense, a neurotechnology company, comes out of stealth with $17M seed funding for non-surgical Brain-Computer Interface.
news.summary: A California-based neurotechnology company called Subsense, Inc. has recently come out of stealth mode to announce its innovation in non-invasive brain connectivity technology. The company is working on creating the first non-surgical Brain-Computer Interface (BCI) using nanoparticles. Subsense was founded by Tetiana Aleksandrova and Artem Sokolov, who have raised $17 million in seed funding for the project. The funding was led by Sokolov's Golden Falcon Capital and will be used to expedite the development of this groundbreaking technology.

news.summary: SeaWorld Orlando's Seven Seas Food Festival offers guests a chance to enjoy renowned concerts and delicious culinary delights. The festival now boasts a larger lineup of performers and brings back the vibrant Mardi Gras celebrations. Set in Orlando, the event promises a memorable experience for attendees. Scheduled to take place on February 18, 2025, this year's festivities are sure to be a hit. For more information and media assets, visit the festival's official website.

Chicago Metro Area is most at risk for severe weather, including hail, winds, and tornadoes according to CoreLogic analysis.
news.summary: CoreLogic®, a prominent provider of property information and analytics, has published its 2025 Severe Convective Storm Risk Report to assist in risk management within the insurance sector, comprising underwriting, claims, and restoration industries. The report analyzes the frequency, severity, and geographic spread of severe convective storm (SCS) occurrences from the previous year up to 2025. It serves as a guide for making informed decisions.

news.headline: Natura Resources announces two advanced nuclear projects in Texas for energy security, deploying in the Permian Basin.

These projects are strategically positioned in the Permian Basin and will significantly bolster energy security and reliability for the state. This move comes at a pivotal time as Texas experiences rapid growth and increasing energy demands.

news.headline: Woxer chooses Reactor Data for data streamlining, replacing legacy ETL to enhance innovation and customer experience.
news.summary: Miami-based company Reactor Data revealed that Woxer, a popular apparel brand focused on creating underwear for daily wear that prioritizes confidence, comfort, and individuality, has selected ReactorData.com as their intelligent data pipeline solution to enhance AI, analytics, and data activation processes. This decision will replace Woxer's outdated ETL system, allowing for smoother data onboarding workflows. The move is aimed at achieving new levels of efficiency and obtaining real-time insights crucial for informing product development decisions and enhancing the overall customer experience.

news.headline: KIVA AI rebrands to Perle, offering human wisdom to AI models. Provides solutions for training and fine-tuning with tools for project requirements and data enrichment.
news.summary: In San Francisco, KIVA AI has officially rebranded itself as Perle. The company now focuses on providing modular training data solutions aimed at infusing human expertise into AI models. Perle offers a range of services to streamline the training and optimization of intricate multi-modal AI models. These services include assisting with project specifications, RLHF, tagging human data by experts, data enhancement and cleansing, as well as safeguarding against adversarial threats. Perle's goal is to offer customers robust tools that deliver valuable insights and intelligence for their AI projects.

news.headline: California Rises Raises $8M+ for Wildfire Relief at Genesis Invitational; $302,915 from Birdies for Good. Donations support Southern California recovery.

This initiative is aimed at aiding in the relief and recovery efforts for Southern California wildfires. The company will also conduct a conference call on the same day to discuss the results with investors and analysts. This update is highly anticipated, as investors are eager to learn about the company's performance in a critical period. The fourth quarter is always a significant time for businesses, and analysts will closely examine the numbers to gauge Flutter Entertainment's growth and profitability. This move indicates transparency and the company's commitment to keeping stakeholders informed about its financial health. news.headline: Sleepypod's pet carriers are first to meet top safety ratings in independent testing by CPS, based on new standards.
news.summary: A company based in Pasadena, Sleepypod®, has introduced a line of pet carriers that have become the initial car safety restraints for pets meeting key crash test requirements in recent independent testing by the Center for Pet Safety (CPS). The carriers were tested under the new CPS-001-016.02 pet restraint system standard, aligning with the revised U.S. child restraint system standard FMVSS 213b. The successful testing marks a significant milestone as Sleepypod® prioritizes pet safety during transportation.

Champion Safe Co. exceeds sales goals with $2.4M YTD 2025 revenue, surpassing $610K at NBS and Sports Inc. shows.
news.summary: In Provo, UT, a leading gun safe and vault doors manufacturer, Champion Safe Company, under American Rebel Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: AREB), has reported significant success in 2025. The company has exceeded its sales expectations by generating over $2.4 million in revenue so far. Notably, more than $610,000 of this revenue was earned during recent shows with Nation’s Best Sports (NBS) and Sports Inc. buying groups. Champion continues to maintain a strong performance in the market.

news.headline: Insurgents advance in DRC, seizing Bukavu after Goma; Alphamin Resources notes mining operations at risk, monitoring closely.
news.summary: In Grand Baie, Mauritius, on Feb. 18, 2025, Alphamin Resources Corp. (AFM:TSXV, APH:JSE AltX) has acknowledged recent reports of insurgents seizing Bukavu, the second largest city in eastern Democratic Republic of the Congo (DRC), following the capture of Goma in late January. Alphamin's mine is currently operating within guidance parameters in a remote area, although the insurgent advance has raised the operating risk profile. Further escalation of the conflict could impact mining operations, prioritizing the safety of employees and compliance with laws. Alphamin is closely monitoring the situation and will provide updates as necessary to ensure safety and operational continuity.
